expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add persistent read-state notification center with filtering and clear actions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state saved so that read or unread status persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification storage includes read-state field per notification",
        "Existing notifications default to unread where read state is absent",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*notification-read-state*",
        "src/models/notification.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend notification read-state actions",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage what still needs attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend action marks a notification as read",
        "Backend action marks a notification as unread",
        "Read-state updates persist and return updated state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/notifications/updateReadState.ts",
        "src/routes/notifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add notification center list surface",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can review individual notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center surface opens from app navigation",
        "List renders notifications with current read-state indicators",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.tsx",
        "src/layout/AppHeader.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread badge count",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge so that I can quickly see when new notifications need review.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Header or nav shows unread count badge when unread notifications exist",
        "Unread badge count updates after marking notifications read or unread",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/layout/AppHeader.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/UnreadBadge.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or reviewed items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter controls include All, Unread, and Read",
        "Selecting a filter updates list contents to matching notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationFilters.tsx",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that old reviewed items do not clutter my notification list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center provides clear-all-read action",
        "Action removes all read notifications and keeps unread notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/notifications/clearReadNotifications.ts",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
